notes: Game works native on Linux (OpenGL). On Proton it works out of the box (probably since Proton 4.11) with DXVK (D3D11 to Vulkan translation). Only keyboard input is a little strange sometimes, not sure if this is an issue of Wine or not. Tested with RADV and the new Mesa ACO compiler on Plasma Wayland.
title: Moonlighter
